trial: TRAILBLAZER-ALZ 4 (donanemab vs aducanumab head-to-head, amyloid plaque clearance)
source: ClinicalTrials.gov internal history API (https://clinicaltrials.gov/api/int/studies/NCT05108922/history and /history/{version}) -- captured live by the agent building outcome_switching.py.

primary_outcomes.measure: Percentage of Participants Who Reach Complete Amyloid Plaque Clearance on Florbetapir F18 Positron Emission Tomography (PET) Scan (Superiority) on donanemab versus aducanumab
Percentage of Participants Who Reach Complete Amyloid Plaque Clearance on Florbetapir F18 PET Scan in the Intermediate Subpopulation (Superiority) on donanemab versus aducanumab

amendment_check_note: Versions 30 (2023-10-11) and 31 (2024-11-04) touch the 'Outcome Measures' module label, but this coincides exactly with results-posting (study completed 2023-09-19; both versions also add 'Outcome Measures (Results)', 'Participant Flow', 'Adverse Events'), not a change to the pre-specified endpoint definitions. Diffing version 0 against version 30's protocolSection.outcomesModule.primaryOutcomes text confirms both co-primary measure names are unchanged in substance across the trial's entire pre-completion history (only trivial capitalization differences: 'donanemab'->'Donanemab').

current_registered_primary_outcomes.measure: Percentage of Participants Who Reach Complete Amyloid Plaque Clearance on Florbetapir F18 Positron Emission Tomography (PET) Scan (Superiority) on Donanemab Versus Aducanumab
Percentage of Participants Who Reach Complete Amyloid Plaque Clearance on Florbetapir F18 PET Scan in the Low/Medium (Intermediate) Subpopulation (Superiority) on Donanemab Versus Aducanumab

analysis_note: No primary-outcome amendment ever occurred for this trial. The co-primary pair registered at inception (overall population + intermediate/low-medium-tau subpopulation amyloid-clearance) is identical, in substance, to the co-primary pair the trial completed and posted results against.
